description: Complete the treb compose command with Phase 3/5 styled output (stage indicators, colored status, gas aggregation), --debug and --dump-command flags, enhanced verbose mode, and updated golden file coverage.

userStories.title: Gas Aggregation in Component Results
userStories.description: As a developer, I want gas_used threaded from PipelineResult through ComponentResultEntry and ComposeTotals so that per-component and total gas usage is tracked and serialized in JSON output.
acceptanceCriteria: ComponentResultEntry has gas_used: u64 field populated from PipelineResult.gas_used
ComposeTotals has gas_used: u64 field summed across all components
JSON output includes gasUsed in both component entries and totals (via serde camelCase)
Skipped and not-executed components have gas_used: 0
Existing compute_totals unit tests updated for new gas_used field
cargo check -p treb-cli passes
cargo test -p treb-cli -- compose unit tests pass

userStories.title: Stage Progress Indicators and Styled Dry-Run Output
userStories.description: As a developer, I want compose execution to show emoji stage indicators and a styled dry-run banner so that progress is visually consistent with the run command.
acceptanceCriteria: Compose execution shows emoji stage indicators for orchestration start, per-component execution, completion, and skipping via print_stage()
Dry-run mode shows a styled warning banner before the plan via print_warning_banner()
Broadcast confirmation uses aligned key-value display via eprint_kv()
--json mode suppresses all stage output (existing !json guards maintained)
All stage output goes to stderr; result data to stdout
cargo check -p treb-cli passes

userStories.title: Debug Mode and Dump Command Flag
userStories.description: As a developer, I want --debug and --dump-command CLI flags on the compose command so that I can inspect per-component forge commands and save debug logs, matching the run command patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI argument parsing accepts --debug and --dump-command flags on compose command
--dump-command prints per-component forge commands in topological order and exits without execution
--dump-command respects resume skip set (skipped components shown with comment)
--debug creates per-component debug log files in .treb/debug-compose-<timestamp>/ directory
--debug prints directory path after execution
cargo check -p treb-cli passes
CLI arg test in cli_compose.rs updated for new flags

userStories.title: Styled Component Result Display
userStories.description: As a developer, I want compose results to show color-coded status per component (green success, red failed, yellow skipped, gray not-executed) with gas usage so that results are easy to scan visually.
acceptanceCriteria: Human output shows colored status per component with appropriate icons (checkmark, cross, skip arrow, dash)
Gas usage displayed per component (when non-zero) and in totals using format_gas()
Failed component error message shows indented below component name
Color output gated on color::is_color_enabled() using styled() pattern
display_compose_json() unchanged; JSON output still uses print_json()
cargo check -p treb-cli passes

userStories.title: Styled Dry-Run Plan Display
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the dry-run plan to show styled component names, script paths, and step numbers with color so that the plan is easier to read.
acceptanceCriteria: Dry-run plan shows styled component names (bold/LABEL), script paths (MUTED), and step numbers (bold) when color is enabled
Skipped entries are visually distinct with WARNING color and (skipped) suffix
Plain output (no color) maintains backward-compatible format for golden files
cargo check -p treb-cli passes

userStories.title: Verbose Mode Enhancement
userStories.description: As a developer, I want --verbose to show aligned pre-execution context (script, namespace, RPC, chain ID, sig, verify) and post-execution summary per component so that I can inspect execution details.
acceptanceCriteria: Verbose pre-execution shows aligned key-value pairs (script, namespace, RPC, chain ID, sig, verify) per component via eprint_kv()
Verbose post-execution shows deployment/transaction/gas summary per component
Resume mode verbose shows compose hash and skip count
--verbose --json suppresses all verbose output
cargo check -p treb-cli passes

userStories.title: Golden File Updates for Compose Command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all compose golden files regenerated to match styled output and new golden tests for dump-command so that output changes are captured and regression-tested.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing compose golden file tests pass with updated styled output format
New compose_dump_command_simple golden test validates per-component forge command output
New compose_dump_command_chain golden test validates dependency order in dump output
JSON golden files have deterministic key ordering via sort_json_keys()/print_json()
No regressions in non-compose golden tests (run, list, show, verify)
Full test suite passes: cargo test -p treb-cli
